title: InstitutionRanking Collection
description: Array of InstitutionRanking records. Each element: Institution ranking aggregating artifact production, citation impact, and AE committee service across affiliated authors.

TopAuthor.description: Summary of a top-contributing author within an institution.

name.description: Full author name, may include DBLP disambiguation suffix, e.g. 'Jing Liu 0074'.
name.title: Name

author_id.description: Stable integer ID referencing the canonical author_index. Null for authors not yet indexed.
author_id.title: Author Id

affiliation.description: Author's institution affiliation, e.g. 'University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign'.
affiliation.title: Affiliation

combined_score.description: Author's combined score: artifact_score + citation_score + ae_score.
combined_score.title: Combined Score

artifact_count.description: Number of artifacts authored by this individual.
artifact_count.title: Artifact Count

ae_memberships.description: Number of AE committee memberships for this individual.
ae_memberships.title: Ae Memberships

total_papers.description: Total papers by this individual at tracked conferences.
total_papers.title: Total Papers

TopAuthor.title: TopAuthor

InstitutionRanking.description: Institution ranking aggregating artifact production, citation impact, and AE committee service across affiliated authors.

affiliation.description: Normalized institution name, e.g. 'University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign', 'EPFL'.
affiliation.title: Affiliation

combined_score.description: Total score: artifact_score + citation_score + ae_score. Example: 633.
combined_score.title: Combined Score

artifact_score.description: Points from artifact contributions. Scoring: 1 (available) + 1 (functional) + 1 (reproduced) per artifact.
artifact_score.title: Artifact Score

artifact_citations.description: Sum of artifact citation counts. Currently 0 for most institutions (tracking in progress).
artifact_citations.title: Artifact Citations

citation_score.description: Points from artifact citations. Currently 0 for most institutions (tracking in progress).
citation_score.title: Citation Score

ae_ratio.description: Artifact-to-AE score ratio (artifact_score / ae_score). Null when ae_score is 0. E.g. 0.48.
ae_ratio.title: Ae Ratio

role.description: Role classification based on artifact-to-AE ratio: 'Producer', 'Consumer', 'Balanced'.
role.title: Role

artifact_count.description: Total number of artifacts produced by authors at this institution.
artifact_count.title: Artifact Count

badges_functional.description: Total 'functional' badges across all artifacts from this institution.
badges_functional.title: Badges Functional

badges_reproducible.description: Total 'reproduced'/'replicated' badges across all artifacts from this institution.
badges_reproducible.title: Badges Reproducible

ae_memberships.description: Total AE committee memberships by authors at this institution.
ae_memberships.title: Ae Memberships

chair_count.description: Number of AE chair roles held by authors at this institution.
chair_count.title: Chair Count

total_papers.description: Total papers at tracked conferences by authors at this institution, sourced from DBLP.
total_papers.title: Total Papers

artifact_pct.description: Percentage of papers with artifacts: (artifact_count / total_papers) * 100. E.g. 53.4.
artifact_pct.title: Artifact Pct

author_count.description: Number of unique authors affiliated with this institution.
author_count.title: Author Count

top_authors.description: Up to 20 top-scoring authors from this institution, sorted by combined_score descending.
top_authors.title: Top Authors

InstitutionRanking.title: InstitutionRanking
